reasoning: 8x zoom exposes multiple clear AI tells. (1) Top decorative strip is a chaotic jumble of isolated colored pixels (red, brown, orange, teal, white) with no coherent shape — classic melting/semantic failure; no recognizable motif can be read. (2) Gold border exhibits gradient-like multi-tone shading instead of clean 2-3 hard pixel-art tones, especially on the vertical side strips. (3) Interior contains scattered dark dashes and a pink smear (bottom-left at 8x) that appear as noise/residual generation artifacts rather than intentional marks. (4) Top-right corner at 8x shows stray gray pixels consistent with AA bleed on a pixel-art asset that should have none. (5) Left-side and right-side top decorations are visibly asymmetric in pixel count and color distribution — asymmetry without intent. (6) Color bleed: teal pixel isolated in upper-right decoration cluster with no neighboring context. Overall the frame structure is readable (pass) but the decorative band and interior noise push this firmly into fail territory.
